general_store.name: Riverside General Store
general_store.description: A cluttered shop selling everyday adventuring supplies.

blacksmith.name: Ironforge Smithy
blacksmith.description: The ring of hammer on anvil echoes from within. The smith sells quality arms and armor.

alchemist.name: Mirela's Elixirs
alchemist.description: Shelves of coloured vials line the walls. The proprietor peers at you over thick spectacles.

market_stall.name: Travelling Merchant Stall
market_stall.description: A colourful wagon with goods piled high. The merchant haggles eagerly.
